news.t: These Bond ETFs Could Keep Winning if Rates Stay Higher for Longer

overview.description: The iShares Treasury Floating Rate Bond ETF (TFLO) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund tracks a broad maturity market-value-selected and -weighted bond index of US Treasury floating rate securities. TFLO was launched on Feb 3, 2014 and is issued by BlackRock.
infoTable: Bloomberg US Treasury Floating Rate Bond

data.title: These Bond ETFs Could Keep Winning if Rates Stay Higher for Longer
data.text: Funds tied to floating-rate debt could continue to outperform if inflation keeps bond yields elevated and delays Fed rate cuts.
